description: This Varied Thrush originially flew by me and landed in a nearby tree in the thick branches.  I noticed the orange color and stripe on it's head and knew immeadiatly that this was a different bird for the area due to coloration.  It was a difficult bird to photograph as it was not very patient and continued to fly away.  It eventually flew to the west side of the river and into a wooded area where I could no longer view it.
photographer: Photographer: Shawn M. Mason , Shawn M. Mason
